services.name: postgres
services.description: Primary database — workspaces, projects, jobs, models.

services.name: minio
services.description: S3-compatible object store for videos, frames, weights.

services.name: ollama
services.description: Local LLM server for the agent (gemma4:e4b by default).

services.name: ollama-init
services.description: One-shot model pull on first boot.

services.name: waldo-app
services.description: FastAPI app — REST API, WebSocket, SPA host.

modules.summary: Admin endpoints — queue and worker management.
HTTP surface for the Waldo agent.
Authentication endpoints — register, login, token refresh, user info.
Proxy downloads from MinIO with proper caching and content types.
Inference serving API — image prediction, video prediction, model activation, deployment targets.
Workflow API — create, save, run, and deploy visual ML pipelines.
Workspace management — create, list, switch workspaces.
WebSocket endpoints for streaming training metrics and prediction results.
Waldo AI Agent — LangGraph ReAct loop served by a local Ollama LLM.
LangGraph ReAct agent — Ollama LLM + Waldo tools, with auth-scoped context.
LangChain tools the Waldo agent can call on a user's behalf.
Authentication utilities — JWT tokens, password hashing, FastAPI dependencies.
Frame-extraction cache backed by /tmp/waldo-frame-cache/.
Multi-model YOLO inference pool for serving predictions — optimized for speed.
Idempotent guards for alembic migrations.
Video object tracker — optimized with frame skipping and batched inference.
Workflow blocks — modular processing units for visual ML pipelines.
Base class for all workflow blocks.
Classical computer vision blocks — no ML required.
Crop block — extracts image regions from detection bboxes.
Detection block — runs YOLO object detection on an image.
Filter block — filter detections by confidence, class, or size.
I/O blocks — image input, video input, JSON output.
LLM block — calls local Ollama for text generation/analysis.
Logic and branching blocks — control workflow execution flow.
Platform integration blocks — connect workflows to datasets, models, training, and deployment.
Specialized CV blocks — OCR, counting, zone analysis.
Visualization blocks — render detections on images for visual output.
Workflow DAG executor — topologically sorts nodes and runs blocks.
Shared dataset-writing utilities for all YOLO converters.
Mask → YOLO classification format (cropped images in class directories).
Mask → YOLO detection bounding box format.
Mask → YOLO oriented bounding box (OBB) format.
Mask → YOLO pose format with centroid keypoint.
Mask → YOLO segmentation polygon format.
Exemplar/click labeling pipeline — uses Sam3TrackerVideoModel for point-prompt tracking.
Shared labeling pipeline utilities — frame extraction, conversion, dataset packaging.
Score-first SAM3.1 detection — drop-in replacement for _detect_with_backbone.
Text-prompt labeling pipeline — uses Sam3VideoModel for detect-and-track.
Video-native labeling pipeline using SAM3.1 MLX.
Build a YOLO-ready dataset from a completed labeling job's annotations.
Export trained YOLO models to various formats with validation.
Stream training metrics to Redis for real-time WebSocket consumption.
Notification dispatchers: Slack, ntfy.sh, email.
YOLO26 training orchestrator — wraps Ultralytics training API.
Tests for the LangGraph agent — tools, graph, and HTTP endpoint.
Extended API tests for review, frames, and training endpoints.
Auth unit tests — deterministic, offline, no external infra required.
Tests for all five YOLO converter modules.
End-to-end test: Upload video → label → download valid YOLO-seg dataset.
Full-loop E2E test: Upload -> Label -> Train (1 epoch) -> Activate -> Predict image -> Export ONNX -> Predict video.
Tests for inference engine, video tracker, serve API, and export validation.
Migration sanity tests — verify alembic can upgrade to head without error.
Verify score-first mask generation produces identical results to original.
Tests for trainer module: dataset_builder, notifiers, metrics_streamer, train_manager.
Initial schema
Phase 2: annotation review, exemplar mode, task types
Phase 3: training runs, model registry
Collections & multiclass support
add name column to labeling_jobs
add version and parent_id to labeling_jobs
add minio_key to demo_feedback
add tags and notes to training_runs
add deployment_targets and inference_logs tables
add model alias column and deployment experiments table
add comparison_runs table
perf indexes — composite indexes for hot query paths
add auth (workspaces, users, workspace_members, api_keys) and saved_workflows tables
add loss_history and metric_history to training_runs
Platform + GPU detection.
.env bootstrap and HF_TOKEN handling.
Pretty logging helpers shared by the installer scripts.
Install missing system dependencies (Docker, uv, Node, build basics).
Colors
Worker entrypoint — prints GPU status before starting Celery so that
Wipe trained models, training runs, and inference artifacts — keep datasets.
Upsert the bootstrap admin user and ensure it has admin membership.
Waldo one-shot installer for Linux, macOS, and WSL.
Usage:
AI Agent — full-page chat.
Dashboard — editorial home with data-driven typographic ASCII hero,
Deploy page — endpoints, testing, model registry, and monitoring.
SAM 3.1 Prompt Playground.
Settings — workspace management, user profile, API keys, admin queue.
Visual workflow editor — Pretext-inspired editorial design.
Workflows list — browse templates (with real graphs) and saved workflows.
Floating sidebar agent panel — read-only, /agent/stream backend.

api_endpoints.summary: One-shot snapshot for the admin panel: workers + queues + stuck jobs.
Revoke a running Celery task.
Force-fail a zombie labeling job so the UI stops spinning.
Force-fail a zombie training run.
Quick reachability check — proves Ollama is up and the model is present.
List models the local Ollama can serve.
Run the agent and return the final answer + tool-call summary.
Stream agent output as Server-Sent Events.
Prompt playground — dispatches a small SAM3.1 run to the Celery worker
Run SAM3 on a single frame with click points.
Create a new annotation (e.g.
Update a labeling job's metadata (e.g.
Delete a labeling job, its annotations, and any associated training runs/models.
Add a new class to an existing dataset by labeling its videos with a new prompt.
Merge two class names — renames all annotations from source to target.
Duplicate a labeling job and all its annotations into a new dataset.
List all unique class names in a dataset with their annotation counts.
Delete all annotations of a specific class from a dataset.
Rich dataset overview with sample frame thumbnails and annotation stats.
Re-export a dataset from DB annotations in the requested YOLO format.
Upload an image and get JSON detections back.
Run SAM 3.1 (MLX) on an image with text prompts.
Run SAM 3.1 (MLX) video-native tracking on a video.
Upload a video for tracked prediction.
Set a model as active and trigger hot-reload in the inference engine.
Return list of class names from the active model.
Return info about the currently loaded model.
List all deployment targets with their assigned model info.
Create a new deployment target (camera, zone, or region).
Update a deployment target.
Delete a deployment target.
Run inference through a named endpoint.
Get status of a named endpoint — model info, config, and whether it's loaded.
Aggregate inference metrics for the monitoring dashboard.
Promote a model to a named alias (champion, challenger, staging).
List all deployment experiments.
Start a blue-green deployment experiment.
End an experiment and optionally promote the winner.
List all registered edge devices.
Register a new edge device.
Edge device phones home — updates status and last_heartbeat.
Upload inference logs from an offline edge device.
List saved comparison runs, newest first.
Save a comparison run for future reference.
Delete a saved comparison.
Upload a file and kick off a background comparison between two models.
Poll for comparison results.
Pre-flight dataset quality report — class histogram, imbalance score,
Update tags or notes on a training run.
Delete a training run and its associated model.
Request early stopping for a training run.
Copy/link existing videos from other projects into a target project and auto-label them.
Upload one or more images to a project as standalone Frame records.
Return all available workflow block types with their schemas.
Run a deployed workflow with an uploaded image.

celery_tasks.name: waldo.label_playground
celery_tasks.summary: Ephemeral prompt test — runs SAM3.1 on a short window of the video.

celery_tasks.name: waldo.compare_models
celery_tasks.summary: Run two models on the same file and store results in Redis.

db_tables.name: deployment_experiments
db_tables.summary: Blue-green / canary experiment: split traffic between champion and challenger.

db_tables.name: edge_devices
db_tables.summary: An edge device running inference (Jetson, Pi, etc.).

db_tables.name: comparison_runs
db_tables.summary: Saved model comparison result for benchmarking over time.

db_tables.name: deployment_targets
db_tables.summary: An inference endpoint that serves a specific model to external consumers.

db_tables.name: inference_logs
db_tables.summary: Append-only log of every inference request for monitoring.

db_tables.name: demo_feedback
db_tables.summary: Stores false-positive / correction feedback from the Demo page.

frontend_pages.summary: Dashboard — editorial home with data-driven typographic ASCII hero,
Deploy page — endpoints, testing, model registry, and monitoring.
Settings — workspace management, user profile, API keys, admin queue.
Visual workflow editor — Pretext-inspired editorial design.
Workflows list — browse templates (with real graphs) and saved workflows.

agent_tools.name: list_projects
agent_tools.summary: List projects in the current workspace with video counts.

agent_tools.name: list_datasets
agent_tools.summary: List completed labeling jobs (ready-to-train datasets) with annotation counts.

agent_tools.name: list_models
agent_tools.summary: List trained models in this workspace with mAP and active status.

agent_tools.name: list_training_runs
agent_tools.summary: List the most recent training runs in this workspace with progress.

agent_tools.name: get_system_info
agent_tools.summary: Return current device/dtype + the active served model.

agent_tools.name: get_training_tips
agent_tools.summary: Recommend YOLO training hyperparameters for a given dataset size + task.

agent_tools.name: start_labeling_job
agent_tools.summary: Queue a SAM-3 auto-labeling job on a video.

agent_tools.name: start_training
agent_tools.summary: Queue a YOLO training run on a completed labeling job.

agent_tools.name: activate_model
agent_tools.summary: Mark a trained model as the active one for /predict/* endpoints.
